whyus.label: Why us?
whyus.title: Choosing Elita — the right decision
whyus.subtitle: We are not just a school — we invest in the future of every student. Here's why parents choose us.
whyus.teachers_desc: Subject-matter experts with international certifications teach here. Individual approach guaranteed for every student.
whyus.results_desc: 95% of our graduates are admitted to state universities. Winning olympiads and competitions is our tradition.
whyus.environment_desc: Classrooms equipped with smart boards, digital labs and high-speed internet. Harmony of technology and education.
whyus.groups_desc: 12–15 students per group. This allows teachers to pay attention to every child and monitor their knowledge level.
whyus.standards_desc: Our curriculum is developed based on Cambridge and IB standards. Foreign language education receives special attention.
whyus.safety_desc: 24/7 security system, psychologist and medical staff. Every student feels safe and supported.

teachers_section.label: Our Teachers
teachers_section.title: Meet our professional team
teachers_section.subtitle: Every teacher is an expert in their field — teaching with knowledge, experience and dedication.

faqs_section.label: FAQ
faqs_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs_section.subtitle: Answers to questions most frequently asked by parents and students

services_section.label: Our Services
services_section.subtitle: A comfortable, safe and quality learning environment has been created for your child
services_section.nutrition_desc: A healthy and balanced nutrition program for children. Fresh meals recommended by doctors are prepared every day.
services_section.languages_desc: English, Russian and other foreign languages are taught using modern communicative methods. Practical sessions with native speakers.
services_section.transport_desc: Special school bus service from all districts of the city. Parents can track their child's movement through GPS tracking system.
services_section.daily_desc: Full-day education: lessons, extra classes, sports and creative activities. Your child is in a safe environment from 08:30 to 16:30.
services_section.individual_desc: A special education plan is created according to each student's abilities and interests. Developing strengths is our main goal.
services_section.vocational_desc: Practical training in robotics, programming, graphic design and other modern professions. We train specialists of the future.

about_page.label: About Us
about_page.hero_subtitle: Quality education, modern approach and a strong team — a solid foundation for the next generation
about_page.history_title: Knowledge and education — the foundation of the future
about_page.values_subtitle: The principles that form the foundation of our school's activities
about_page.value1_desc: We provide every student with high-quality knowledge through modern curricula and innovative approaches.
about_page.value2_desc: Developing creative thinking in students and encouraging independent decision-making is our main goal.
about_page.value3_desc: By creating an atmosphere of collaboration between teachers, students and parents, we achieve success together.
about_page.value4_desc: We prepare our students for future successes with a sense of order and responsibility.
about_page.cta_subtitle: Have questions? We are always ready to help
